notes: Confirm the exact Polo generation and dashboard before choosing a procedure.
Do not assume 6R and 6C use identical immobiliser access.
Verify HU66 versus HU162T physically before cutting.
Identify keyed or keyless specification on MQB vehicles.
Use stable battery support during reading and adaptation.
Check current tool coverage before accepting late MQB all-keys-lost work.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
